---
title: "Transcriptomics Project"
subtitle: ""
author: "Roa Hanoun & Jero Eyras"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
    toc_float: false
    number_sections: false
    theme: cosmo
    highlight: tango
fontsize: 12pt
geometry: margin=1in
---

# Exploratory Data Analysis

```{r}
data6 <- read.table("./data/GSE268987_LF_6vsC_6_deg.txt", sep = "\t", quote = "", header = T)
head(data6)

dim(data6)
str(data6)
```

```{r}
data36 <- read.table("./data/GSE268987_LF_48vsC_48_deg.txt", sep = "\t", quote = "", header = T)
head(data36)
```


```{r}
Control_6 <- 2:5 

Exposed_6 <- 6:9 
```
